title: Grilled Octopus with Croatian Aioli
description: A Mediterranean-inspired dish featuring tender grilled octopus paired with a creamy Croatian aioli.
instructions: 2. In a small bowl, whisk together lemon juice, garlic, and olive oil.
3. Brush the mixture onto both sides of the octopus tentacles.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Grill the octopus for 2-3 minutes per side, or until slightly charred.
6. In a separate bowl, mix together Croatian aioli ingredients (see below).
7. Serve the grilled octopus with Croatian aioli and garnish with chopped parsley and capers.
